summary: Stock & Inventory module testing completed successfully. All 24 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing verified all 7 tabs (Status, Opening, Purchase, Sales Return, Item Ledger, User Ledger, Suppliers) are working correctly. Stock calculation formula verified: closing = opening + purchased + sales_returned - sold - purchase_returned.
critical_code_review_comments: Stock calculation formula correctly implemented: closing = opening + purchased + sales_returned - sold - purchase_returned
All stock endpoints properly require authentication
Supplier deletion prevented when purchases exist (good data integrity)
Stock availability integrated into Orders page with Avail Qty and Pur. Rate columns
Opening balance supports both single and bulk updates
Item ledger shows credit/debit with running balance
User ledger supports search by customer name or phone
seed_data_creation: Test suppliers and stock transactions created during testing (prefixed with TEST_STOCK_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock & Inventory module fully tested. Database has 1 test item (TEST_RESTORE_REPLACE_001) with opening balance 50, purchased 25, purchase return 5, sales return 2, closing balance 72. Test suppliers created during testing. Stock availability API returns item_id -> {closing_balance, last_purchase_rate} map.

features_tested.GET /api/suppliers: PASS - Returns list of suppliers (auth required)
features_tested.POST /api/suppliers: PASS - Creates supplier with name and mobile
features_tested.POST /api/stock/opening-balance: PASS - Sets opening balance for an item
features_tested.POST /api/stock/opening-balance/bulk: PASS - Sets opening balances for multiple items
features_tested.POST /api/stock/purchase: PASS - Records purchase with supplier, items, rates
features_tested.GET /api/stock/status: PASS - Returns stock status with closing balance calculation
features_tested.GET /api/stock/item-ledger/{item_id}: PASS - Returns credit/debit ledger for an item
features_tested.GET /api/stock/availability: PASS - Returns item availability map for order processing
features_tested.Frontend Stock Status tab: PASS - Shows correct closing balance calculation
features_tested.Frontend Purchase tab: PASS - New Purchase and Purchase Return buttons working
features_tested.Frontend Sales Return tab: PASS - New Sales Return button working
